ops.title: cc-steer current state (v0.10.0 / cc-transcript 9): post-rename, cleanup + collection refresh done
ops.body:
CANONICAL STATE (2026-07-07): cc-steer on PyPI (latest v0.10.0), GitHub yasyf/cc-steer, HF dataset yasyf/cc-steer-traces, Python module cc_steer, data dir ~/.cc-steer/, code ~/Code/cc-steer on this machine + yasyf@yasyf (old ~/Code/cc-pushback + ~/.cc-pushback are empty breadcrumbs w/ MOVED.md). main=13d4a16 (agrees local/GitHub/remote). Floor cc-transcript>=9,<10.

SHIPPED: S1 (judge steering frame, prompt v6; categories incl. direction; operational_directive split), S2 (refiner {action,direction}, refine v3/opus), S3 (full rename cc-pushback->cc-steer, manual DB migration, no back-compat). Then v0.9.1 (cc-family floor) + v0.10.0 (BREAKING cc-transcript 9 model-free verdict identity: verdict unique per dedup_key,role,prompt_version, model=provenance; triage.canonical_key added, null for steering). See log 1c4460e + memories cc-steer-rename-decisions, cc-steer-v0.10-verdict-identity-canonical-key.

PIPELINE (5 stages): detectors -> triage (judge, opus/large, pool token) -> auditor -> refine ({action,direction}, opus) -> enrich (codex review backend, shared ~/.cc-transcript/corrections.db) -> export --push (HF traces/sft/dpo/kto). Current dataset: traces 4416, sft 3525, dpo 543, kto 4416.

OP PLAYBOOK: LLM passes wrap in bash -c (shell is fish; ccp emits bash export lines): bash -c "eval \"$(ccp env --account N)\"; uv run cc-steer <cmd>". Pool accounts acct-01..10 via ccp; large=opus; one full opus pass ~exhausts an account -> rotate / chunk --limit; --no-sync on intermediate passes, sync once at the end. scan ALWAYS --transcripts ~/.cc-steer/mirrors/yasyf (bare scan pollutes with local ~/.claude). enrich needs codex logged in (~/.codex/auth.json). HF: preflight WRITE (upload+delete marker) before push — repo_info only proves read. rsync mirror BEFORE any move to keep incrementality. macOS ty blind -> docker Linux gate. New DB machine? migrate triage to v9 schema by hand (verdicts_ddl()).

STILL OPEN: yank old cc-pushback 0.8.1 on PyPI (web-UI only, no API/token; needs user PyPI session) at https://pypi.org/manage/project/cc-pushback/releases/ — yanking only 0.8.1 leaves 0.8.0 as installable latest, so consider yanking all 11 versions to fully tombstone.
ops.when: starting or resuming cc-steer work, running the pipeline, or picking up the residual tail (yank old cc-pushback 0.8.1 on PyPI)
